basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 6 Library Trainee Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with Master of Library and Information Science (M. Lib. Inf. Sc.) qualification can directly attend the interview on 21-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation to SC, ST, OBC, and PWD is applicable as per GOI norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master of Library and Information Science (M. Lib. Inf. Sc.)
qualification.details: Master of Library and Information Science (M. Lib. Inf. Sc.) from an affiliated university/institute with at least 60% marks or equivalent, obtained after graduation. Candidates awaiting the final results or the last semester results of M.Lib.I.Sc. may also apply.

selection_process: Written Test Trade Test Walk-in Interview

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Mandi Library Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Mandi Library Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_mandi_iit: Master of Library and Information Science (M. Lib. Inf. Sc.)

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Library Trainee Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Mandi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Mandi Library Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Mandi Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master of Library and Information Science (M. Lib. Inf. Sc.) from an affiliated university/institute with at least 60% marks or equivalent, obtained after graduation. Candidates awaiting the final results or the last semester results of M.Lib.I.Sc. may also apply.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
IIT Mandi Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation to SC, ST, OBC, and PWD is applicable as per GOI norms.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Salary
IIT Mandi Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Mandi Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Trade Test Walk-in Interview

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Mandi Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Mandi Library Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Library Trainee posts at IIT Mandi is scheduled for 21st July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Library Trainee position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Library and Information Science (M. Lib. Inf. Sc.) degree from a recognized university with at least 60% marks. Those awaiting final results can also apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Library Trainee role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Library Trainee position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC, ST, OBC, and PWD candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Library Trainee post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Library Trainee position will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 22,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Library Trainee post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the Library Trainee position at IIT Mandi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Library Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, a Trade Test, and a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to perform well in all stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Library Trainee position is offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Indian Institute of Technology Mandi, Himachal Pradesh, Mandi - 175005.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.
